title: Bridge Essay: Disrupted prediction errors index social deficits in autism spectrum disorder.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Knowledge/Gnosis** (Phase 14) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Knowledge/Gnosis to mechanistic neuroscience through Disrupted, prediction, errors, index, social.

**Disrupted prediction errors index social deficits in autism spectrum disorder.** — Brain. PMID: 28031223. DOI: 10.1093/brain/aww287. Social deficits are acore symptom of autism spectrum disorder; however, the perturbed neural mechanisms underpinning these deficits remain unclear. It has been suggested that social prediction errors-coding discrepancies between the predicted and actual outcome of another'sdecisions-might play acrucial role in processing social information.
